evals.prompt: Execute Phase 1 (Planning) for a new feature called 'user-notifications'. The spec directory already exists at .claude/specs/user-notifications/ and project-config.md shows NestJS + React stack.
evals.expected_output: Reads phase-1.md, checks preconditions, dispatches planning-team, validates outputs, updates progress.md

assertions.name: reads_phase_file
assertions.description: Reads the phase-1.md file from the phases/ directory

assertions.name: checks_preconditions
assertions.description: Verifies required input files exist before executing

assertions.name: dispatches_correct_agent
assertions.description: Dispatches planning-team for Phase 1

assertions.name: validates_outputs
assertions.description: Checks that requirements.md was produced

assertions.name: updates_progress
assertions.description: Updates progress.md with phase completion status

evals.prompt: Resume the pipeline from Phase 3 (Build). Phases 0-2 are already complete. The spec directory has requirements.md, design.md, and tasks.md. project-config.md shows Django + React.
evals.expected_output: Skips phases 0-2, reads phase-3.md, dispatches feature-team, validates build outputs

assertions.name: skips_completed_phases
assertions.description: Does not re-execute phases 0, 0.5, 1, or 2

assertions.name: reads_phase_3_file
assertions.description: Reads phase-3.md from phases/ directory

assertions.name: checks_preconditions
assertions.description: Verifies tasks.md and design.md exist before building

assertions.name: dispatches_feature_team
assertions.description: Dispatches feature-team for Phase 3

assertions.name: phase_transition_gate
assertions.description: Asks user for approval before advancing to Phase 4

evals.prompt: Phase 2 (Design) just failed — the design-team agent didn't produce a valid api-spec.md. Handle the failure and retry.
evals.expected_output: Detects missing output, retries once with error context, escalates to user if retry also fails

assertions.name: detects_missing_output
assertions.description: Identifies that api-spec.md was not produced

assertions.name: retries_once
assertions.description: Re-dispatches the responsible agent with retry prompt

assertions.name: max_one_retry
assertions.description: Does not retry more than once

assertions.name: escalates_on_second_failure
assertions.description: Reports failure to user if retry also fails

assertions.name: preserves_progress
assertions.description: Does not mark the phase as complete on failure

evals.prompt: Execute Phase 0.5 (Project Setup) for a brand new project. No project-config.md exists yet. The user wants to build a mobile app.
evals.expected_output: Reads phase-0-5.md, dispatches project-setup agent, validates project-config.md is produced

assertions.name: reads_phase_file
assertions.description: Reads phase-0-5.md from phases/ directory

assertions.name: dispatches_project_setup
assertions.description: Dispatches project-setup agent

assertions.name: validates_config_output
assertions.description: Checks that project-config.md was produced

assertions.name: updates_progress
assertions.description: Marks Phase 0.5 complete in progress.md

assertions.name: transition_gate
assertions.description: Asks user before advancing to Phase 1

evals.prompt: Run Phase 4 (Testing) but project-config.md says testing framework is 'none' and coverage threshold is 0. Should this phase be skipped?
evals.expected_output: Reads phase-4.md, checks conditional logic in project-config.md, skips or runs minimal testing based on config

assertions.name: reads_phase_file
assertions.description: Reads phase-4.md

assertions.name: checks_conditional_logic
assertions.description: Evaluates project-config.md to determine if testing is configured

assertions.name: handles_skip_correctly
assertions.description: Either skips with explanation or runs minimal validation

assertions.name: updates_progress
assertions.description: Updates progress.md regardless of skip/run decision

assertions.name: documents_decision
assertions.description: Explains why the phase was skipped or what was tested
